jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - 1mg - Top MNC
jsonLd.description:
1mg invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Senior Software Engineer at our Dhanbad location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About 1mg:
1mg is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in JavaScript

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Dhanbad, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with 1mg!
